data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R
Addition of lysine due to transpeptidation/Addition of K
proline oxidation to pyroglutamic acid/Tryptophan oxidation to oxolactone/aldehyde and ketone modifications
Removal of initiator methionine from protein N-terminus, then acetylation of the new N-terminus
amidination of lysines or N-terminal amines with methyl acetimidate
Loss of C-terminal K from Heavy Chain of MAb/Deletion of K
Addition of arginine due to transpeptidation/Addition of R
Cleavage product of EGS protein crosslinks by hydroylamine treatment/Addition of D

project.title: proteome of lgG4+ regions from EoE patient biopsies by AutoSTOMP
project.projectDescription: characterize inflammatory proteins enriched in IgG4+ lesions in human esophageal tissues
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Six 1 mm biopsies were collected from a patient diagnosed with active EoE, then the EoE was stained against IgG4. Then the EoE tissue was processed by AutoSTOMP procedures. The two portions from each biopsy are collected: the IgG4+ region and the non-IgG4 region (or called FlowThrough, FT). Please see the AutoSTOMP protocol in the paper, https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.1c00505
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The raw mass spectra data were parsed by MaxQuant (versions 1.6.14.0, Max Planck Institute of Biochemistry). The MaxQuant results were then analyzed following the label-free quantification (LFQ) data analysis protocol. The data of replicates was grouped by the conditions, and normalized between the comparing conditions pairwise.

references.referenceLine: Medernach JG, Li RC, Zhao XY, Yin B, Noonan EA, Etter EF, Raghavan SS, Borish LC, Wilson JM, Barnes BH, Platts-Mills TAE, Ewald SE, Sauer BG, McGowan EC. Immunoglobulin G4 in eosinophilic esophagitis: Immune complex formation and correlation with disease activity. Allergy. 2023 78(12):3193-3203
